title: Top Rated El Yunque Rainforest & Waterslide – SmallGroup Tour
description: Adventure into the rainforest on a historical journey where you'll discover various natural wonders. Complimentary transportation from San Juan is included. Explore two waterfalls, a waterslide, and enjoy a 35-minute hike. The tour concludes a visit to a local restaurant for authentic cuisine (not included in the price). Our team of local guides is dedicated to showcasing the best of the island for a unique, authentic experience. We keep our group sizes small to ensure high-quality service and safety for all participants. Life jackets and safety equipment are provided. The hiking trail can be very muddy, and participants should expect to get completely wet. As a 100% locally owned company, our team consists of passionate local guides who deeply love Puerto Rico. Join us for an award-winning tour experience!

images.caption: https://media-cdn.tripadvisor.com/media/attractions-splice-spp-720x480/07/b0/a2/06.jpg

title: Mixology Class at Casa BACARDÍ in Puerto Rico
description: In this exciting and informative experience, you will hear about the history behind some of the world's most iconic cocktails in addition to learning the fundamentals of mixology. You’ll start with a welcome cocktail at the Pavilion, then, a BACARDÍ guide will lead you through crafting some amazing cocktails. At the end, you’ll have access to purchase Casa BACARDÍ Special Reserve, our exclusive premium rum, not found anywhere else in the world!

title: ATV Single Rider Adventure Near San Juan - Hacienda Campo Rico
description:
Hop on an ATV "Ride of a Lifetime."  Share fun with family and friends on 4X4 machines, feel the power beneath you as you track through different trails in this hidden paradise. 

Experienced guides will take you through 2,200 acre of land where you will enjoy views of mountains, mangroves, lagoons, limestone formations and wildlife roaming freely. Learn the history of Puerto Rican countryside as well as the plants and animals that inhabit it during the short narrated breaks on your adventure. 

When the tour is over, relax in our unique hilltop Mojito Bar where you can cool down with refreshing drinks of your choice.

images.caption: Locally guided, adrenaline-packed, and memory-making – this is your next must-do!

title: San Juan Guided Turtle Snorkel Tour and Complimentary Videos
description: Dive into the ultimate snorkeling experience in San Juan, Puerto Rico, where you can swim with sea turtles in clear, tropical waters. Perfect for all skill levels, our guided tour offers an exciting opportunity for both beginners and seasoned snorkelers. Recognized as the number one tour in the world, this unforgettable journey includes free GoPro videos so you can relive every moment. Secure your spot today and enjoy a snorkeling experience that will leave you with memories to last a lifetime!

images.caption: Snorkel with Turtles

title: Day Sail with Transportation from San Juan, Condado, Isla Verde!!
description:
First, we sail to the paradise Island of Icacos aboard the modern, 51 ft. sailing catamaran,  SPREAD EAGLE II!  The brisk 40 to 50-minute sail to the protected anchorage off of this uninhabited Spanish Virgin Island is beautiful. Sparkling beaches and crystal clear snorkeling waters await. We think you deserve the best, don’t you? Over 65% of our guests are repeats or referrals. 

The reefs are teeming with parrot fish, foureye butterfly fish, sergeant majors, and wrasse. The variety is too long to list, so you should just come see them all for yourself. Ask one of the crew to see the Fish, Coral, and Shell Identifying Charts on board. SPREAD EAGLE II even provides lunch for the fish. With a little patience, you can get the fish to eat bread right out of your hand.

images.caption: Icacos Beach

title: 3 Tours in 1 Day: Old San Juan, Rainforest, Beach with Transport
description:
“3 Tours in 1 Day” This tour bundle visits 3 must see locations in the Island. 1st Discover the rich history of Old San Juan on a hop-on, hop-off tour, 2nd explore tru the lush trails & visit two natural waterslides in El Yunque Rainforest, and 3rd visit Los Kioskos Beach a beautiful and fun spot for relaxation and Puerto Rican cuisine. All with convenient Round-trip transportation. 
This is the ultimate island day experience. 
Join us! Reserve your spot, We do the rest!

title: Cave, Waterfall and River Adventure in Charco Azul from San Juan
description:
This is an absolutely unforgettable experience. This day trip has it all: adventure, pristine tropical rivers, waterfalls, cave swimming, beautiful scenery, adrenaline, fun and even some archeology/history along the day. 
We will swim through caves, go under cool waterfalls, and even cliff jump from cliffs ranging from 8 to 27 feet (optional of course.) The place is almost undiscovered, not like El Yunque where you can easily encounter hundreds of people in a single day. Mostly just locals here or people who come with us! The drive from the meeting point to the rainforest caves is about one hour. Along the way you will see the real Puerto Rico, quite removed from the tourist area. You will see a more rural way of life where the locals are connected with nature. The scenery along the drive and hike is absolutely incredible. Once the adventure begins, we will take you through the jungle. We grew up doing this and know the area like the back of our hands, so you are safe with us.

title: El Yunque Waterslide and Waterfall beach Tour with Food n Photos
description:
Join us on a short, scenic drive from San Juan to El Yunque Rainforest for one of Puerto Rico’s most exciting outdoor adventures.

Explore hidden natural waterslides and rivers via a short hike on a private road. Slide down smooth rainforest rocks, swim in clear pools, and reach a beautiful waterfall with swimming and jumping spots.

After the rainforest adventure, we’ll head to a stunning local beach, where you’ll relax and enjoy authentic Caribbean street food on us.

This experience is more than a tour. You’ll enjoy water activities, local insight, hidden spots, fun group energy.

*What’s Included*

Round trip transportation in air conditioned vans
Authentic Caribbean street food
Refreshments and snacks
Guided access to rivers, waterfalls, and waterslides

Perfect for couples, families, friend groups, cruise visitors, bachelor & bachelorette parties, and private tours.

Million Dollar Memories at Hostel Prices.
Book now and experience El Yunque like a local.

images.caption: Nature’s waterslide, the ultimate rainforest

title: Off-Road UTV Tour : Explore Puerto Rico minutes from San Juan
description:
Live an epic 2 hours adventure in an amazing 2 or 4 Seater UTV Off-road vehicle in the 2,300-acre Hacienda Campo Rico located only 5 minutes away from San Juan.
We are sure this off-road experience will be the highlight of your vacation in Puerto Rico!
Your 2-hour tour includes an exciting ride through a variety of rugged terrains in trails with breathtaking views of different ecosystems. The adventurers will enjoy the amazing sceneries of the karst region including haystack mountains, valleys, wetlands and beautiful lagoons.
Our off-road tour guides take pride in sharing interesting facts of the flora and fauna of the subtropical forest. This off-road tour offers a great photo opportunity of the varied ecosystems in the subtropical forest.

title: FlyDining: 4 Course Sunset & City Light Dinner Over Old San Juan
description: Experience the perfect fusion of elevated dining and gourmet cuisine with our exclusive seating options for a personalized adventure. At 5:30 p.m., immerse yourself in the breathtaking shift from golden beaches to a serene sunset, while our 7:15 p.m. and 9:00 p.m. seatings captivate diners with the magic of city lights twinkling against the night sky. Suspended high above the ground, this unparalleled experience delivers an adrenaline rush alongside panoramic views that redefine traditional dining. It’s not just about the height; it’s about savoring exquisitely crafted dishes while floating in the open air. With safety and comfort as our top priorities, each moment is as serene as it is thrilling—perfect for celebrating special occasions or adding a memorable touch to any day. More than just a meal, this is a remarkable journey that elevates dining to extraordinary heights.

title: Jet Ski Tour through San Juan Bay
description:
*Scenic Views: Participants can enjoy breathtaking views of the historic San Juan skyline, including colorful buildings, forts, and the coastline.
*Historical Significance: The bay is home to iconic landmarks like El Morro and San Cristóbal forts
*Thrilling Adventure: Jet skiing adds an adrenaline rush to the sightseeing experience.
*Guided Experience: Many tours are led by knowledgeable guides who provide insights into the area’s history and culture, enhancing the overall experience.
*Access to Hidden Spots: Some tours may include stops at less accessible beaches and coves, allowing for swimming and snorkeling away from the crowd.
*Experience Level: Tours are often suitable for both beginners and experienced riders, making it an accessible activity for a wide range of individuals.

Overall, a jet ski tour in San Juan Bay combines adventure, history, and stunning scenery, making it a memorable way to explore this beautiful part of Puerto Rico

images.caption: You had me at jet ski!

title: Culebra Snorkeling Tour by Catamaran from Fajardo
description: Let a high-speed catamaran zoom you to one of the 10 top beaches in the Caribbean! This day trip from Fajardo takes you across pristine waters to a beautiful beach – Flamenco or Culebrita (Little Snake) – situated just off Culebra Island, known for crystal clear waters and colorful reefs. Includes adeli style lunch buffet and beverages. The remainder of the day is yours for sunbathing, swimming or beachcombing along miles of powdery white sand.

images.caption: Flamenco beach stop
Pinching their nose, a traveler leaps into the ocean off Puerto Rico.

title: The Maestro's Walk
description: Follow in the footsteps of our Maestros del Ron into the heart of the aging process, and discover how their craft, shaped by the Caribbean climate and time, defines every drop of BACARDÍ rum, finishing with a guided tasting of our premium aged expressions.

title: Icacos Luxury Sailing Catamaran All Inclusive Tour
description:
Escape the ordinary and experience the ultimate in luxury and fun aboard Getaway Too, our 54-foot catamaran designed for an intimate and personalized adventure. Unlike other tours, we limit our capacity to just 49 guests, ensuring ample space, comfort, and unmatched attention to detail.

From our floating beach club with daybeds, water slides, and swings to our curated culinary delights and open bar, every detail is crafted to elevate your day. Explore the hidden gems of the Cordillera Cays, dive into the vibrant Caribbean waters, and unwind with our exclusive amenities, including shaded retreats, private restrooms, and onboard music vibes.

With Sail Getaways, you’re not just booking a tour—you’re embarking on an unforgettable journey filled with authentic Puerto Rican hospitality and breathtaking moments

title: Underwater Sea Trek in San Juan: Explore Beneath the Waves
description: Explore the underwater world of San Juan with a special helmet that allows you to walk along the ocean floor and get up close to colorful corals and exotic marine life. This guided 1.5-hour tour is limited to four people, requires no swimming or scuba diving experience, and is suitable for glasses or contact lens wearers and children over 8 years.

title: Vieques Bio Bay Tour and Beach Day Trip from San Juan by Ferry
description:
Experience the Brightest bioluminescent bay on the World! (Guinness World Records Certified)

Join us on the only same day Vieques Bio Bay + Beach Day Trip from San Juan without spending a night in Vieques with a VIP Itinerary.

Once-in-a-Lifetime Bioluminescent Experience!

Experience relaxation at one of the most beautiful beaches in Puerto Rico, Sun Bay Beach, have dinner and walk by the amazing Malecon at Esperanza, and then Paddle on a Clear Bottom Kayak through the mystical mangrove channels and feel the adventure as you explore the captivating glowing water of Mosquito Bay.

Guided trip into one of the most amazing natural phenomena of the world with our tandem CLEAR BOTTOM KAYAK! The adventure to Puerto Mosquito can only be described as magical.

*The beach stop on the itinerary will be Sunbay or Esperanza Beach depending on weather conditions and timing on the itinerary.

Age Requirement: 4+

Combined Kayak Weight Limit: 380 pounds

title: Night Kayak - Condado City Lights Tour
description:
Our award-winning Night Kayak: City Lights Tour is unlike anything you’ve ever done before! Arrive and put on your Glow paint & Glow-sticks — and snap some great photos. Your guides will then provide a quick “Kayak 101.” Ready, set, GLOW!

Paddle across the lagoon on an unforgettable urban adventure surrounded by the stunning Condado city lights. These views are breathtaking! If you’re lucky, you may even spot tiny fish, sea stars, or resting iguanas in the mangrove trees along the way. Make sure to ask your guides about all the best bars and beaches to visit — they have all the inside info for your trip! This is truly a great way to see the city from a different perspective and have an absolute blast while doing so. A must-do when visiting San Juan!

Notes:

Arrive 30-45 minutes before departure time.
Complimentary storage lockers are available. We are not responsible for damaged, lost, or stolen goods.

title: Authentic Flavors of San Juan Food Tour
description:
Join your host for a 3-hour culinary exploration of staples like single-origin Puerto Rican coffee, Caribbean sourced chocolate, street food and mojitos, or piña coladas. Try the iconic dish "mofongo", all with the cobblestone streets and colorful facades of the city’s oldest neighborhood as your backdrop. Your tour also includes historical and cultural information of Old San Juan.  

Everything is included in the ticket price - food, 1 cocktail, and a historical walking tour. Get a taste for the authentic flavor and culture of Puerto Rico while dining across a handful of local mom & pop restaurants.

We will try to accommodate food intolerances or allergies, but we CANNOT accommodate 
1) vegan 
2)allergic to bell pepper, cilantro, onion 
3)gluten free

*IMPORTANT: You must advise of any food allergies and dietary restrictions in the special requirements field at the time of booking.

images.caption: Puerto Rico's most famous dish: the mofongo!
Freshly-made mofongo waits to be devoured in Old San Juan, Puerto Rico.

title: The Beast Zipline at Toroverde Adventure Park in Puerto Rico
description: Boost your adrenaline to the maximum levels once you reach a speed of 100 km/h in, The Beast. Without a doubt, it will be an adventure that will take your levels of energy to the most.

title: Puerto Rico Ziplining: High-Flying Adventure close to San Juan
description:
The Ecoadventure Ziplining Adventure half-day tour happens only five minutes away from San Juan! You can select from convenient 9:30 AM, 1:30 PM and 3:30 PM sunset sessions. Your adventure begins with a 15-minute hike through a beautiful subtropical forest in the breathtaking 2,300-acre private estate of Hacienda Campo Rico. Enjoy five exhilarating ziplines and trek over five hanging canopy bridges. The tour ends in the unique hilltop Mojito Bar, where you can purchase a refreshing beverage including cold beer and the best Mojito drinks in town.

IMPORTANT NOTE: At the time of booking please indicate the weights of each participant in pounds (lbs), not in kilograms (kgs). If you submit weights without the units or in kgs we will assume it is in lbs. PLEASE MAKE SURE YOU USE THE CORRECT WEIGHT UNIT. Your reservation might be denied if the participants in the group are over the weight limit of 230 lbs. (250 lbs maximum if the participant is 6' tall or taller.)

title: Jet Ski Rentals at Isla Verde Beach – San Juan Puerto Rico
description:
Our Jet Ski rentals at Isla Verde Beach stand out for their unbeatable location, exceptional service, and flexible ride options. Conveniently located right behind the Fairmont Hotel, we offer quick and easy access to one of Puerto Rico’s most beautiful coastlines.

Choose from 30‑minute, 45‑minute, or 60‑minute rentals and enjoy the freedom to explore the crystal‑clear waters at your own pace. Each Jet Ski includes one free passenger, as long as the combined weight does not exceed 320 pounds, and you’re welcome to switch drivers anytime at no extra cost—perfect for couples, friends, and families.

Our friendly, experienced staff is committed to providing a safe, smooth, and unforgettable adventure on the water. With high‑quality equipment and personalized attention, we make sure every rider feels confident, comfortable, and ready for fun.

Come ride the waves with us and see why we’re one of the top Jet Ski experiences in Isla Verde.

title: Sunset Salsa Beach Class in San Juan
description:
This activity is unique because it combines the beauty of Puerto Rico's sunset with the passion and energy of salsa dancing. It offers a romantic and immersive experience that allows participants to fully engage with their surroundings and connect with their partners through the language of dance. 

The experienced instructors provide guidance and support to ensure that everyone can participate, regardless of their skill level, making it accessible and enjoyable for everyone. 

Overall, this salsa class offers a one-of-a-kind opportunity to experience the beauty and culture of Puerto Rico in a truly unforgettable way.

title: La Parguera Bio Bay Boat Ride and Swimming w/ San Juan Transport
description: Touted by most as an “indescribable” experience, watch the water sparkle and dance as it's disturbed. Immerse yourself in nature under a beautiful sky far away from the city. No LED's or man made effects, just the natural phenomenon of bioluminescence in the calm waters of this protected habitat. Without the ability of cameras to capture the effect, this is truly a must see event!!

title: Old San Juan Golf Cart Exploration (Est. 2023)
description: We pride ourselves in providing a unique experience aboard our amazing Golf Carts with our friendly and knowledgeable staff, guaranteeing to leave you wanting more. What makes this experience unique is our extreme levels of customer service and our ability to please each end every age group that comes to us looking for a unique San Juan experience, all the while showing you the “3 sides of San Juan” . Customers should definitely pick this experience because it will end up being the highlight of their day in Old San Juan, plus you get to cover more ground than those that are walking, also you have a on board cooler with refreshing iced water for free!

title: San Juan Sunset Harbor Boat Ride
description:
Hop aboard and join us for a captivating journey on a sunset pontoon boat tour, exploring the timeless allure of San Juan Bay, the historical gem of Puerto Rico. 

Our Sunset Tour offers a perfect fusion of cultural exploration, awe-inspiring views, and countless photography opportunities. Capture breathtaking images of Old San Juan's iconic landmarks from the pontoon, including Paseo la Princesa, Fortaleza (Governor’s Mansion), Bacardi Distillery, Morro Fortress (San Felipe del Morro’s Castle), Puerto Rico’s Capitol Building, San Juan’s Door, and the formidable 500-year-old San Juan Fortified Walls.

Indulge in the sunshine, relish the vibrant Caribbean atmosphere, and witness Old San Juan from a unique perspective. This is perfect for those who want to pass by these historical landmarks by sea. Treat yourself to delicious light snacks and appetizers, and try our local beer and rum punch, as you soak in the beauty of this unforgettable experience. New Depart Time: 6:00PM

title: Clear Kayak Tour in Condado Lagoon
description:
Our Morning Kayak Tour is one of the most magical ways to start your day, both for those visiting our island or for locals alike! The Condado lagoon is one of the best places to kayak in Puerto Rico, so, it can get crowded (usually fills up around noon)... So on this kayak adventure our group will have the entire lagoon basically to ourselves... Well, sharing with local birds, fish, and manatees of course (fingers crossed we see any and all!). Our guides will also provide great recommendations for local restaurants beaches, etc. Get ready to enjoy beautiful 360 degree city skyline views in our ultimate Urban Adventure!

Remember to arrive 20 minutes BEFORE departure. (If no guides are at the tent, they’re finishing the prior tour).

title: 2 Tours in 1 Day: Rainforest Waterslides & Beach Tour w/Transport
description: In this All in 1 Day Tour, explore Puerto Rico’s natural beauty and local beach culture. Slide down two natural rainforest waterslides and cool off in crystal-clear spring water. Then, enjoy two relaxing hours at Luquillo Beach—grab tropical drinks, taste authentic cuisine, or shop souvenirs at Los Kioskos strip. This tour includes roundtrip transportation for a fun, worry-free experience. It’s the perfect mix of adventure, beach time, and island vibes—all in one unforgettable day!

title: Rainforest Cave Tubing & Waterfalls Hiking Adventure
description: Is not just tubing! This will be the best experience in the island and will make you feel in a real Jurassic Adventure! Getting in the heart of the island exploring this awesome Underground Cave formations in Charco Azul Vega Baja and Arenales caves. You will be visiting caves and waterfalls. The adventure includes Tubing in Calm waters Paddling with your hands thru caves and the river. Challenge yourself Hiking by the trails and Climbing by difficult terrains to get in and out the forest. Waterfalls and cliff Jumping will make you enjoy this natural enviroment. Nature, Waterfalls, Caves, Adrenaline, Trekking, Climbing and Hiking will make this a great Adventure day. *Moderate to challenging level. *13 years old up to 65. *250 Pounds maximum weight. *Not recommended for people overweight or any kind of surgery that difficult your movement to hike & climb on difficult terrains. *Close shoes require. *We meet the participants at Doramar plaza about 20 minutes from San Juan area.

title: Horseback Riding Tour at Private Ranch
description:
Mount up on our beautiful gentle,spirited well trained Paso Fino horses and explore breath-taking countryside views just minutes from San Juan on a 2,200 acre private ranch. Soak up the Caribbean Sun while enjoining the sights and sounds of wildlife on the smoothest horses around. 

Experienced guides will take you around lagoons, through tropical vegetation, and around mountains with views of coastal plains. Learn the history of the Puerto Rico Paso Fino and why the health and spirit of our animals is our number one prioroty.

When the tour is over check out our unique hilltop Mojito bar where you can cool down with refreshing drinks of your choice

images.caption: Unplug and unwind as you ride through serene paths and scenic surroundings.

title: Culebra Ferry Tickets & Round-Trip Transport from San Juan
description:
Experience the beauty of Culebra Island at your own pace with a hassle-free day trip designed for independent travelers, families, and adventure seekers. Explore top spots like Flamenco Beach, Tamarindo Beach, or choose a boat trip to Culebrita, depending on your interests.

Enjoy a personalized booking link and dedicated support to reserve exactly what you need, including Jeep or golf cart rentals, snorkeling tours, boat trips, taxis, and beach chair and umbrella rentals at Flamenco Beach. All tours and rentals on Culebra are booked and paid separately, giving you full flexibility.

Travel with direct, stress-free transfers from San Juan and a priority-style return service that avoids parking hassles, long ferry lines, and crowded shuttles.

Schedule:

Mon–Fri: Shuttle 6:45 am | Ferry 9:00 am | Return 5:30 pm | San Juan 8:45 pm

Sat–Sun: Shuttle 5:55 am | Ferry 8:00 am | Return 4:00 pm | San Juan 6:45 pm

An easy, flexible, and worry-free way to discover Culebra.

title: Two-in-One Day Trip: El Yunque and Bio Bay Tour with Transport
description:
Get ready to experience two of Puerto Rico’s most amazing natural attractions in one unforgettable day! This full-day package covers the best of the East Coast, so you don’t have to worry about planning a thing. We’ve got you covered with round-trip transportation, a guided rainforest adventure tour, and an evening Bio Bay kayak tour.

Discover the hidden gems of El Yunque with our "off the beaten path" rainforest adventure. Our expert guides will lead you through muddy trails, across rivers, and to stunning waterfalls. Enjoy natural waterslides, a thrilling rope swing, and immerse yourself in the raw beauty of Puerto Rico’s premier tropical rainforest. It’s a journey filled with excitement and natural wonders you won't find anywhere else.

As night falls, prepare to be amazed by the bioluminescent waters of Fajardo Bio Bay. This natural wonder glows thanks to tiny organisms called dinoflagellates. Paddling through these sparkling waters is a magical experience you’ll never forget.

title: Small-Group El Yunque Waterfall & Waterslides with Pickup
description: This is an adventure good for those looking to enjoy nature and a unique rainforest experience. This experience is focused on providing a true local view of El Yunque, with historical facts and information about the ecosystem along the trip. Transportation is included and we pick you up anywhere in the San Juan Area.

title: San Juan: Snorkeling with Turtles and Complimentary Videos
description: Experience the magic of exploring the marine world at a stunning beach in San Juan. Join this beginner-friendly adventure led by a professional guide in small groups of up to 10, ensuring a personalized and high-quality experience for all. The bay boasts a vibrant array of marine life and magnificent Green Sea Turtles. Guests often spot blue tangs, sergeant majors, fairy basslets, yellow snappers, and more! Occasionally, you might encounter rare creatures like squids, seahorses, rays, and manatees. We suggest the morning time slots as the marine life is more active. Receive a complimentary video to commemorate your unforgettable adventure. This Activity is suitable for ages 8 years and above.

title: ATV Double Rider Adventure Near San Juan - Hacienda Campo Rico
description:
Hop on an ATV "Ride of a Lifetime". Share fun with family and friends on 4X4 machines, feel the power beneath you as you track through different trails in this hidden paradise. 

Experienced guides will take you through 2,200 acre of land where you will enjoy views of mountains , mangroves, lagoons, limestone formations and wildlife roaming freely. Learn the history of Puerto Rican countryside the plants and animals that inhabit it during the short narrated breaks on your adventure. 

When the tour is over check out our unique hilltop Mojito

title: San Juan Snorkel with Turtles and Manatee's; Free Video and Rum!
description:
If no availability , please call us directly. We are a Beginner Friendly,SWIMMERS ONLY snorkel company that offers Sea Turtle AND Manatees on the same tour; with a guarantee; If you miss your favorite animal, come again free! We also provide a FREE video of your groups sea life , FREE shot of Rum for adults!

We explore a protected free-range marine sanctuary where our sea life calls home. On our swim we will encounter wild sea life through out our area. 

Please note: We will be passively interacting with our ocean friends, which means NO petting, NO touching, NO feeding of the wildlife at anytime. All species may not be present on every tour.

After the tour we will gift a taste of island rum to our guests as an end of day gift along with a Free Video capturing the wildlife of the day; note every guest may not be highlighted in the video

Please be advised, this tour is subject to cancelation due to weather, check marine conditions and emails before departing to the event

title: San Juan PR Watersports Car Rental Blue McLaren
description: Experience the thrill of a VIP adventure with a water jet car. Drive a luxurious jet car that feels just like a sports car—on the water! Cruise through the crystal-clear Caribbean waters of San Juan Bay while taking in breathtaking views of iconic landmarks such as Old San Juan, La Fortaleza, and Castillo San Felipe del Morro. Whether you’re looking for an exciting ride for two or a fun-filled outing for the entire family, there’s a car that suits your needs. Feel the rush of speed as you explore the coast uniquely and exhilaratingly. This experience requires that drivers be 21 years of age or older, while passengers must be at least 12 years old, making it a perfect adventure for a wide variety of participants.

title: Bioluminescent Bay Night Kayaking, Fajardo 7:30pm
description: Paddle through a water trail beneath the stars on our Biobay Night Kayaking Tour. This adventure begins deep within a protected mangrove forest reserve, where you’ll kayak along calm, winding channels surrounded by towering trees and the sounds of Puerto Rico’s nocturnal wildlife. The darkness amplifies the serenity, turning each paddle stroke into part of an unforgettable journey. As you emerge into the bay, the water comes alive with a blue-green glow, creating a surreal, once-in-a-lifetime experience. With small groups, stable double kayaks, and experienced local guides, this is the perfect way to explore Puerto Rico’s natural wonders at night. Spots are limited — book now to secure your adventure.

title: Small Group El Yunque Half Day Tour with Transport: Waterslide
description:
Discover El Yunque the boutique way. Our small-group rainforest tour is designed for travelers who want an authentic, safe, and intimate experience. While many tours pack 20–40 people per guide, we keep our groups intimate—around 10 guests—for more personal attention, comfort, and safety.

Travel from San Juan in an air-conditioned vehicle and explore El Yunque’s lush trails with your certified guide. Learn about the rainforest’s history, culture, and wildlife as you make your way to the river. Enjoy natural waterslides, rope swings, and crystal-clear pools with high-quality helmets and life jackets included.

Unlike other El Yunque tours that can last 7+ hours due to crowds and long waits, our strategically timed 5.5-hour experience avoids delays. In the afternoon tour, you may see other groups, but never long lines or chaotic bottlenecks.

Enjoy El Yunque with no rush, no stress, and no big crowds—just pure nature, adventure, and a guide who truly cares.

title: El Yunque Exclusive Experience: Waterslide Adventures w/Transport
description:
Transportation, pictures, videos, bottle water—all included!

Experience the best-quality service with local tour guides born and raised here in Puerto Rico.

Enjoy with the BEST!!!!!!! This amazing tour in the east side of El Yunque National Forest. Learn about the history of the El Yunque & Puerto Rico, as well as its flora and fauna.

You will have a blast with us on two natural water slides, jumping from different cliffs and flying on the rope swing while we capture your memorable experiences with pictures and video at the waterfall. (All this it’s optional)

The trail walk takes about 20 to 25 minutes, and then it's about another 5 minutes to reach the 2 natural water slides and waterfalls and spent time then swimming in the river. 

After the adventure, we stop to enjoy local Boricua food at a nearby kiosk Luquillo.

title: Old San Juan Bar Crawl: Experience Local Hotspots
description:
Puerto Rico the Rum Capital of the World, Welcomes You to the most unique bar scene in the Old City of San Juan, with a rich history that dates back 500 years. You'll have the experience of a lifetime bar-hopping around its scenic streets. Meet our team of young and talented hosts and let us take you a specially crafted route around 3 locally owned bars. Be greeted with shots and one free Mojito upon arrival. Enjoy our tailored open Bar for 45 Minutes .
Our experience is perfect for solo travelers, couples, and small and large groups. Mingling is half the fun!

Disclaimers : 

“if you would like to avoid large crowds and have a more intimate experience and meet other travelers the best booking times are between SUN-WED”

Be Advised:

WE ARE NOT a Historical Tour experience , we are engaged in getting you out of your comfort zone have a good time , engage with the local community and experience night life in puerto rico ,come with us and meet people from all over the world.

title: Legacy Tour at Casa BACARDÍ in Puerto Rico
description: Enjoy a welcome cocktail at the Bar at the Pavilion with a scenic view. Step into the history of BACARDÍ with this guided, story-driven introduction to our family heritage and historic milestones. The Legacy Tour concludes with a guided tasting of our exclusive Casa BACARDÍ Special Reserve. For guests seeking a deeper exploration of the distillery grounds, consider upgrading or combining this tour with another experience.

title: El Yunque Tour with Luquillo Lunch Stop and Transport: 6 ppl Max
description:
Our certified guides go above and beyond to create an unforgettable experience for you! We focus on tours with exclusive groups of up to six people for the comfort of our travelers. Quality over quantity is our motto! We pick you up from the comfort of your accommodation from the areas of San Juan, Carolina, Canovanas, Rio Grande, Ceiba, Luquillo and parts of Fajardo. The earlier we start, the better to avoid larger tour companies!

Each tour is led by a passionate and knowledgeable guide who wants to share his love for the island with you! On this tour, we will walk through muddy trails that are only 1.5 miles long! This popular trail leads through beautiful waterfalls that are natural water slides and pools with crystal-clear water! For the last stop, you will enjoy authentic Puerto Rican food next to one of the most beautiful beaches on the island!

Welcome to Puerto Rico, and we hope to see you soon on tour!

title: Full-Day Cueva Ventana, Indian Cave and Waterfall Adventure
description:
We want you to know every corner of Puerto Rico. For this reason, in this adventure, we will be visiting three different unique destinations on the north coast of the island. Visit part of the karst area; the rock formations in this area have formed an unforgettable landscape toward the Atlantic Sea. Enjoy the stunning views from this area and learn about the rich and abundant history of Puerto Rico. We continue our journey to the mountain and visit one of the most impressive caves on the island. The visit will be carried out by experienced and informed guides to give you the best possible experience and finally, we will be going a little further into nature where will visit two waterfalls where you can enjoy the rest of the day on the river. If weather conditions are dangerous, we will visit a natural spring instead. 

This is an active tour which requires moderate physical activity and basic swimming skills.

title: Puerto Rico Jet Snorkel with Turtles and Videos in San Juan
description:
Everyone wants to snorkel, but who wants to spend all the energy that it takes?
Jet snorkel allows customers to snorkel while saving their energy for other things.

title: Make Your Own Perfume Guided Workshop | Old San Juan
description:
Making your own perfume is a unique and personalized fragrance experience, setting it apart from traditional perfume shopping. 

Personalization: Customers can create a fragrance that is uniquely theirs, tailored to their personal tastes and preferences. This involves selecting from a variety of base notes, middle notes, and top notes to craft a custom blend. 

Interactive Experience: The process is hands-on, allowing customers to engage in the art of perfumery. This interactive aspect makes it a fun and educational experience. 

Creative Expression: It provides an opportunity for creative expression. Customers can experiment with different scent combinations and discover what appeals to them the most, making the experience both artistic and sensory. 

Unique Gifts: The personalized aspect to gift-giving adds a special touch that off-the-shelf perfumes lack. 

Memory Association: Creating a personalized scent can be linked to specific memories or events.

title: Small-Group El Yunque Waterslide & transportation w/ Photos
description:
"You can't miss El Yunque when you visit PR, & you can't miss experiencing El Yunque without Puerto Rico Experience!" This is what people often describe our tours! We are one of the oldest and top rated El Yunque tour companies, & this is our new platform to connect with you! Our group have the most educated, experienced and trained guides. We prioritize quality over quantities, we keep our tour group size small. Ensuring safety and providing a personal experience for our guests is our No.1 priority. 

You will spend the day with our knowledgeable guides hike and explore El Yunque. You will learn about the history and culture of PR and the eco-system of the forest and enjoy what the nature has to offer, cliff jumping, rope swing, rockslide natural water slides and waterfalls. 

We also provide the tour in different languages upon your request including but not limited to Spanish and English!! Choose us, we will create memories and make your day at El Yunque magical and unforgettable!

title: Beginner Scuba Diving with Turtles and Free Videos, San Juan
description: Try scuba diving today, with no certification required. Come explore the beautiful underwater world of Puerto Rico and see tons of tropical life and fish!

title: El Yunque National Forest Guided Tour with Transport
description: On this tour, you'll be picked up at your place of stay and driven to El Yunque National Forest, which is about an hour from San Juan. You’ll experience El Yunque National Forest through the eyes of our passionate guides. You’ll be guided and listen to live documentaries about the cultural significance of this place to our Puerto Rican ancestors. This tour will give you a lot of knowledge about the importance of the tree species, wildlife, and mountain land to the people of Puerto Rico. The tour lasts about 5 hours from pick-up to drop-off, including driving time, three different stops within the forest, and a stop at a local place for souvenir shopping and lunch before making our way back to San Juan.

title: Picnic in San Juan Puerto Rico
description:
Picnic offers a unique and unforgettable experience by creating beautiful, personalized picnics tailored to your special event. Whether it’s a romantic sunset date, a celebration with friends, or a memorable family gathering, we make every moment special. We specialize in sunset picnics and offer morning picnics until 9 PM, allowing you to enjoy the perfect setting at any time of day.

Our picnics feature delicious charcuterie with ham, cheese, and fresh fruits, along with a variety of board games for added fun. You can even add a canvas painting kit for a creative touch. With breathtaking views of the sea, our picnics are the perfect way to relax, celebrate, and make memories that will last a lifetime. At Duarte's Picnic, we go above and beyond to ensure your event is truly exceptional.

title: Stunning Private Beach Photoshoot in Puerto Rico's Hidden Gem
description: What sets this beach photoshoot apart is the exclusivity of the location—our private, secluded beach in Piñones ensures a serene and crowd-free experience. Unlike busy tourist spots, you'll have the entire backdrop of Puerto Rico’s natural beauty to yourself, allowing for more intimate and personalized photos. As a local, I know the best angles and hidden gems for capturing stunning shots, making your experience truly one-of-a-kind. With professional editing and a warm, friendly approach, I’ll ensure you leave with beautiful memories that go beyond just photos.

title: El Yunque Ziplining with River and Beach Visit
description: Experience the thrill of a lifetime in the beautiful foothills of El Yunque National Rainforest! Upon your arrival, you’ll be equipped with a helmet and harness, ready to take on the adventure ahead. Fly through the lush canopy on nine carbon fiber zip lines, followed by two exciting rappels that will get your heart racing. Afterward, take a 15-minute nature walk to discover the rich history and diverse flora of this stunning area. If weather permits, enjoy a refreshing plunge into the Mameyes River, where you can choose to cliff jump or swing from a rope (optional)! Before heading back to San Juan, treat yourself to some delicious local food and drinks at the lively kiosks of Luquillo Beach. This is your chance to create unforgettable memories while exploring the beauty of Puerto Rico!

title: Bacardi Rum Distillery and Old San Juan Tour
description:
Enjoy a trip thru some of the most popular landmarks in the Old San Juan area, drive by San Felipe del Morro Fortress, Ballaja Barracks, and Capitol Building.
Afterwards is a 20 minute drive to Bacardi Rum Distillery
for The Legacy Tour (45 mnts) and learn about the history and unique craftsmanship of Bacardi Rum.

1 hr drive in San Juan and 1 to 1.5 hrs in Distillery.
Includes: Distillery entrance ticket and One cocktail.
(additional cocktails can be purchase) 
Meeting Point : Plaza Colon, Old San Juan
Arrive 15 mnts early for check inn

Must be 18+ Years

Important Notice :
If by any reason Bacardi Rum Distillery is not
available, it will be replace with Barrilito Rum 
Distillery, those not interested can cancel with 
a full refund.

title: Bio Bay Night Kayaking with Transport from San Juan
description:
Paddle through the mangrove forest on your way to the unique Bioluminescent Bay of Laguna Grande in Fajardo, Puerto Rico! Savor your surroundings while the sunset fades, bask in the beauty of your surroundings and experience the thrill of night kayaking.

Here at Peniel Access Eco Tours, our Adaptive Paddling Program also provides ample opportunity for anyone who would like to try kayaking for the first time or have any special challenges – from issuing better, comfier seating to towing, our team has got you covered.

Live-commentary and interpretations are offered by our tour guides who will lead and assist you all along the way.

So put on your life vest and get ready for an encounter with nature!

images.caption: Bio Bay Night Kayaking Tour

title: San Juan Surfing Lessons: Ride the Waves in Puerto Rico
description:
If you are looking to make your time in San Juan even more enjoyable, take a surf lesson! Whether you are by yourself or with a group of friends, the experience of catching a wave is unforgettable! 
Our incredible surf instructors have been with us consistently since we opened in 2012. They are professionals who can help you select the proper surf board and teach you no matter what your skill level. All instructors are certified life guards (certified Red Cross).

title: Scenic Horseback Riding Tour from San Juan
description: Explore Puerto Rico’s lush countryside on horseback! Depart San Juan and spend your morning ascending rugged countryside terrain at Hacienda Campo Rico. Your knowledgeable guide will make sure you enjoy every minute of this horseback-riding tour. Please read additional details for more information.

title: Bioluminescent Bay Kayak Adventure Tour from San Juan
description:
This is one adventure not to be missed while in Puerto Rico! Join this fully-guided nighttime BioBay kayak adventure into one of the most amazing excursions of your life. Paddle your way through the mystical mangrove channels leading to “Laguna Grande” in a two seater kayak along with the companionship of the amazing tour guides. After kayaking for 30 minutes you will arrive to the lagoon where you will meet our glowing friends, the Pyrodinium Bahamense, microscopic plankton capable of producing natural light at the touch of your hand (like fireflies)! Explore these amazing organisms up close as our professional eco-guide takes you to discover all its secrets. Learn how this fragile and unique ecosystem maintains a perfect balance of life and learn what you can do to protect such a special place. 
After spending an approximate 30 minutes at the bay, we will head back thru the same mangrove channel we came in.

title: El Yunque Rainforest Hiking Tour from San Juan
description: Explore El Yunque National Rain Forest with a certified tour guide, we begin driving up the mountain about 3,000 feet above sea level. First stop will be at Yokahu tower, an obsevation tower to appreciate and take expectacular photos of El Yunque, second we’ll be making a stop at La Coca falls to see the beauty of this natural wonder, third we’ll be making a hike for approximately 45 mnts in one of the available trails (intermediate trail). Next stop is a waterhole stop for swimming in one of the available rivers (swimming optional).

images.caption: Hiking Trail

title: Single ATV Private Hacienda Experience & Roundtrip Transportation
description: Trade city vibes for countryside thrills and unleash your adventurous spirit with this ATV Experience. Enjoy the thrill of driving in a 1 person all-terrain vehicle through a 2,200-acre private ranch that leads you through plains, mountains, forests, lagoons, a plantation home and ends at the Mojito bar. We offer pick-up & drop-off only from major hotels in San Juan Metro area. The price listed is for a single ATV that seats one (a driver). Drivers need a valid driver's license. After your thrilling ATV ride, enjoy a refreshing virgin Piña Colada on us! Invented in Puerto Rico, it’s the perfect way to cool down.

title: San Juan Mini Boat Tour
description: Our most complete tour for those explorers who would like a glimpse into San Juan's captivating history, have an adventure in the waters of the harbor at the helm of your own boat and stop to learn the highlights of the city’s history.

title: Afro Puerto Rican Folklore Bomba Class and Live Music
description: What makes this activity unique is its authentic immersion into the rich cultural heritage of Puerto Rican Bomba. Led by passionate instructors with extensive experience in Puerto Rican folklore, participants have the opportunity to learn and experience Bomba in its traditional setting, accompanied by live music. The classes take place at the statue in Parque Jose Celso Barbosa, Ocean Park Beach, providing a picturesque and culturally significant backdrop. Additionally, the classes cater to individuals of all skill levels, creating a welcoming and inclusive environment for everyone to enjoy and learn this traditional art form. With the option for private group bookings and flexibility in case of inclement weather, this experience offers a dynamic and memorable way to connect with Puerto Rican culture through dance and music.

title: San Juan Historical Bay Daytime Sailing Tour
description: Authentic sailing is culture, having a conversation with a local, with the power of the wind, no engine noise, no crowds, no fake pirates, no stray cats, no crowds, no need to scream . . . we sail sideways, aboard a real racer-cruiser (J30), with a toilet and a cabin, just real life sailing. You'll get to see a different perspective of old San Juan, with complimentary drinks, feeling safe but free, in small groups (no crowds.) Good for any special moment, or turning this moment into an special one. While in contact with nature elements, sometimes you may get surprised by dolphins. There are 6 people maximum per sailboat. Sailboat model: Jboat J30 (racer-cruiser.) It's not luxury yacht or a catamaran. Let's sail with Sail San Juan Bay!

title: Taino Indian Cave, Arecibo Hike and Beach Tour from San Juan
description: This day trip is guaranteed to make your stay in the island unforgettable. This tour has adrenaline and adventure, history and archeology, beautiful scenery and beaches. The drive to Arecibo is About an hour and it is beautiful from start to finish. We arrive and begin our hike to the cave of the Taino. Bring good shoes as the hike is quite rocky. The entrance to the cave is not for claustrophobic people. it is bit challenging but with our careful instructions you will be able to get inside (barring any physical conditions that hinder you). The cave is other worldly. You get transported to the past as you see the over 100 carvings in the stone that are hundreds, maybe thousands, of years old. After we exit the cave we will hike through the famous 7 arches of Arecibo. The arches are natural rock formations which can be appreciated in pictures, but only in person will you realize how beautiful it all really is. Last we visit a non-touristy beach that is amazing!

title: Caribbean Food Experience
description:
Savor the bold flavors of Puerto Rico in this fun and flavorful small-group cooking and tasting tour in the coastal town of Piñones. Led by a local chef, this relaxed experience is perfect for food lovers of all kinds—whether you want to roll up your sleeves in the kitchen or just sit back, sip a piña colada, and enjoy an unforgettable Puerto Rican meal.

You'll learn about essential island ingredients like plantains, sofrito, and adobo, watch traditional cooking techniques come to life, and enjoy generous tastings of classic dishes—freshly prepared just for you. This isn’t just a cooking class; it’s a cultural food experience where you eat, learn, and connect.

title: El Yunque Rainforest Tour with San Juan Transportation
description:
Experience Puerto Rico without big group crowded tours! Skip the long waiting stuck in lines, and dive straight into a small group El Yunque Rainforest adventure with our exclusive half-day express tour. This isn't just any tour—it's a personalized journey where you'll get the attention and safety you deserve, exploring El Yunque, the only Caribbean tropical rainforest in the U.S. with an expert local guide.

Feel the rush as you slide down a jaw-dropping 20-foot natural water slide, leap off cliffs of varying heights, and swing like Tarzan into crystal-clear pools. Hidden waterfalls, unmarked trails, and secluded lagoons await you, offering a truly unique and breathtaking experience far off the beaten path.

Get ready to push your limits, discover the unknown, and make memories you'll talk about for years to come!

title: San Juan Nightlife Tour in a Private Can-Am UTV Ride & Party
description: Throughout your adventure, you will see the scene in Old San Juan, Condado, T-Mobile District and La Placita de Santurce known for its bars and clubs. You will enjoy a delicious night with all the pleasures and gastronomic debuts in Puerto Rico.

title: Snorkeling in Paradise - Videos Included
description: Who doesn’t dream of tropical waters and beautiful sea creatures? In Puerto Rico we are so lucky to snorkel among gorgeous wildlife and calm seas right off the shore. Be our guest and let us show you the magic of the underwater world!

title: Bioluminescent Night Kayaking with Transport from San Juan 4pm
description: Feel the anticipation of exploring a new place, will escort you on a memorable journey to the mangrove forest of Laguna Grande where you will delight in your surroundings, kayaking at night in a beautiful water trail trough the mangrove forest of Laguna Grande Reserve. Join us for a tour today!

title: Private Vacation Photoshoot with Photographer in San Juan
description:
⭐ Top-Rated Vacation Photoshoots 2025

We're not just photographers, we're storytellers capturing your holiday exactly as it feels. With over six years of experience photographing travellers around the world, our small team specialises in authentic, natural photography that truly reflects your trip.

In San Juan, we combine creativity with local knowledge to show you hidden gems, secret angles, and the best light. You'll not only get beautiful, professional photos but also insider tips to make the most of your time here.

We're proud to be recognised among the top-rated photography tours of 2025, trusted by travellers worldwide for our relaxed style and stunning results.

title: Outdoor Salsa Class Experience in San Juan
description:
Salsa music and dance are a big aspect of the Puerto Rican lifestyle and culture. Learn the basics of it with or without a partner in a 1-hour beginner class! The park where the class is held is very centrally located with on walking-distance many bars and restaurants to have dinner and/or go out at night and practice what you have just learned!

You will be guided through the first steps of Salsa dance by a professional at a beautiful outdoor park location. After your class you will be ready in no time to hit the dance floor!

Take your chance and learn from the best, have fun and enjoy!

title: El Yunque Rainforest- Water Slide, Luquillo Beach Guided Tour
description: Utopia Luxury Tours stands out from other tours by offering a unique experience that includes visits to four stunning locations, along with complimentary professional photos and a video recap of your day. We combine culinary delights with natural adventures, guiding you through the rainforest and natural waterslides then ending the day with calm waters of luquillo beach next to the kiosko de luquillo a strip of restaurants and bars set to meet the culinary needs for any diet. Book with us for an unforgettable exploration of Puerto Rico’s beauty.

images.caption: Las Pailas, Group Tours, Guided Adventures

title: San Juan Bay Private Tour with Drinks and Tapas: 4+ people
description: Get more time, See more do more!, More Space! Welcome aboard your private water tour aboard a choice between a 37 foot sailboat ot a a high performance Powerboat. Enjoy complimentary local drinks. Your personal tour guide and Pro USCG certified Captain will guide you to stunning and interesting historical points of interest full of Caribbean flare in style and with a high quality sound system. Choose between a bay or sunset water tour. For a minimum of 4 guests or pay for 4 and a maximum of 6. Welcome aboard!

title: Full-Day Tour: El Yunque, Luquillo Beach, Bio Bay Night Kayaking
description:
Weight limit is 240 lbs. per person.
Our tour guide will meet you at your hotel or location, (contact us for confirmation). Exposition regarding our Puerto Rican heritage, and live commentary and interpretation of your surroundings can be given in both English and Spanish throughout the journey. Once we arrive at the Rainforest, we will take a nature walk path (watch out for wet, uneven terrain) through the flora until reaching the river stream. Do not forget your towel and swimsuit! (Swimming is dependent on weather conditions) After this time, we head back to your lodgings.
This Bio Bay and Rain-forest Tour Combo gives you the chance to explore and enjoy two of the most visited attractions in Puerto Rico.

title: Adventure Water Bike in Condado Lagoon, San Juan
description:
Disfruta de un recorrido en nuestras bicicletas acuáticas en la laguna de el Condado, donde podrán apreciar el antiguo histórico puente "Los Hermanos", la vida marítima de nuestro arrecife en reserva natural, podremos ver tortugas, manatíes, peces de distintas especies!
Nuestras bicicletas acuáticas son livianas, fáciles y seguras de manejar. Nos enfocamos en que el recorrido sea de su agrado y disfrute el tiempo. Las tranquilas aguas de la laguna te permitirá disfrutar de un momento único y agradable. Divertido tanto para amistades y toda la familia. Ver dos mundos en un solo lugar la ciudad y la laguna.

title: SJU Airport to San Juan area or return
description:
We are a local company dedicated to the Transportation Service, for individuals, groups, companies, special events, and more, throughout the Island. 

In addition, we offer you a wide variety of experiences with which you can give that magical touch to your stay filling it with unforgettable memories. Just tell us what you wish for your stay or experience and we will make it happen! 

At Transport and Experiences Puerto Rico we want you to feel like part of our family, very welcomed and lovely treated. Our team will guide and advise in your best interest so you can fulfill all your desires for your stay in Puerto Rico. 

Professional and Friendly Service

title: Discover Old San Juan Rich Heritage
description: Stroll through the cobblestone streets of Old San Juan, where you'll visit historic forts, churches, and plazas. Learn about the city's colonial past and its strategic importance in the Caribbean. Immerse yourself in the vibrant history and culture of Puerto Rico with Dr. José Morales, a seasoned historian with a PhD in History of America, specializing in Puerto Rican and Caribbean history. With over 15 years of experience teaching history, culture, and social sciences at various universities in Puerto Rico, Dr. Morales offers an in-depth exploration of the island's heritage, from its indigenous roots to its African influences.

title: Half Day Icacos Island with Roundtrip Transport from San Juan
description: Embark on the ultimate tropical escape with our 4-Hour Snorkeling and Beach Tour to Icacos Island! This Half-day adventure takes you to the pristine shores of Icacos, where crystal-clear waters, vibrant coral reefs, and soft white sands await. Start your journey with a guided snorkeling excursion to explore the underwater wonders teeming with colorful marine life. Then, unwind on the beach, enjoy swimming in turquoise waters, or simply relax under the Caribbean sun. Perfect for couples, families, and groups, this tour includes roundtrip transportation, buffet-style lunch, fruit and salad bar, endless drinks, all snorkeling gear, expert guidance, and plenty of time to bask in the island’s natural beauty. Treat yourself to an unforgettable day of sun, sea, and snorkeling at Icacos Island!

title: Fajardo Bioluminescent Bay Night Kayak Adventure from San Juan
description:
A truly special enchanting experience of paddling through the mystical mangrove forest under the starlit sky. Unlike any other activity, you'll enter the mangrove forest through a winding water trail, immersing yourself in nature's tranquility and beauty.

Not only will you embark on a magical adventure with Peniel Access Eco Tours, but you'll also become a part of something bigger—conservation. By joining our night kayaking tour, you're not just exploring the beauty of Laguna Grande Reserve; you're actively contributing to its preservation.

Our knowledgeable guides will enhance your experience providing commentary in English or Spanish. Plus, we provide all the necessary gear, ensuring a comfortable and safe adventure for all.

With convenient transportation upgrades and free parking at our location, getting to the starting point of your adventure is a breeze. And with safety as our top priority, you can relax and enjoy every moment of your journey.

title: Night Guide: Clear LED Kayaking Experience in Condado Lagoon
description: What sets us apart is our state-of-the-art LED-illuminated clear kayaks, which act as a glowing window into the lagoon’s nocturnal world. Unlike standard tours, our powerful underwater lights allow you to discover marine life like sea turtles and rays in their natural habitat after dark, all while surrounded by the stunning, vibrant lights of the San Juan skyline.

images.caption: 100% Clear Kayaks with powerful LED lights for night exploration

title: Cave Adventure: Canyon and Hidden Waterfall in Charco Azul
description:
What sets this adventure apart is the expertise of our certified local interpreter, who brings deep knowledge of the area and its rich history. Join us for an off-the-beaten-path hiking and caving experience in El Sistema de Cuevas Arenales in Vega Baja, Puerto Rico.

We’ll begin with a scenic walk alongside a river in the north-central part of the island, far from the usual tourist crowds. Immerse yourself in nature as we jump off canyon cliffs, swim through stunning caves, and learn about the history of the Taíno natives of Puerto Rico.

Please note that this is not a private tour. Transportation is included from a designated meeting point.

title: Half-Day Tour: El Yunque, Waterslides, and Luquillo Beach
description: The Yunque Rainforest National Park is the only of its kind in the whole U.S. territory. The natural rock waterslide is part of our unique experience. You will have time to swim and enjoy the beauty of the river and forest.

title: El Yunque Rainforest and Waterfall Guided Tour
description:
Upon arriving in Ceiba, we will commence with a 25-30 minute hike, which includes a brief river trek. Once we enter the outskirts of the forest, you will climb through rocks and trees to reach the pristine natural pools and waterfalls. Here, you can also swing from a rope or cliff jump. We will spend some time here before proceeding to the next stop, an advanced hike to higher natural pools that lead to exciting natural waterslides. We then return through the same path, with the option to swim part of the way.

Throughout this excursion, your certified guide will share important information about the only tropical rainforest in the US Forest System, as well as intriguing facts about Puerto Rico's culture and history, while ensuring you have a safe, enjoyable, and informative experience.

After the tour concludes, we will stop at a local restaurant for a late lunch (food cost not included) before returning to San Juan or your initial meeting point.

title: Discover El Yunque National Park: Half-Day Rainforest Tour
description:
Take time to escape to heaven on Earth in this half day tour, and let the natural beauty of El Yunque Rainforest captivate you with its lush green vegetation, amazing flora, huge boulders, cascading rivers and scenic views. Visit the only Tropical Rainforest in the US Federal jurisdiction, with over 28,000 continuous acres. Immerse yourself with the vibrating energy of El Yunque’s rivers and clean air, just like the indigenous Taíno tribe did centuries ago while

Our certified tour guide will provide amazing history and stories during the course of the tour. Visit the renewed Portal Visitor's Center where you will be able to interact with some of it's flora and fauna, among others. Stop at the world famous La Coca Waterfall, the perfect setting for picture opportunities.  We will also climb at the Yocahú Observation Tower, and stop at other areas to enjoy the different views of El Yunque.  

This is a low impact activity suitable for all ages and does not involve any hiking.

title: Old San Juan Guided Walking Tour
description:
• Story-packed Old San Juan walking tour revealing culture, legends, and history most visitors miss
• Visit the second oldest church in the Western Hemisphere and iconic Old San Juan landmarks
• Take photos at floating umbrellas, ocean-view city walls, plazas, and a fun pigeon stop
• See the narrowest building in the Western Hemisphere and hidden details most visitors walk past
• Easy pace with time for photos, questions, and a piña colada recommendation where it was invented

This guided Old San Juan walking tour starts at Paseo de la Princesa and leads into the cobblestone streets of the Walled City. Learn why Old San Juan was fortified, how it became a major Caribbean port, and what makes it unique. Walk along historic city walls with ocean views and visit the Caribbean’s largest fortification. Ideal for first-time visitors who want a stress-free introduction, insider context, and a deeper experience than a self-guided walk.

title: River Caving at Arenales Charco Azul, Indian Cave and waterfall
description:
Enjoy the wonders of Puerto Rico with a certified, fun, and responsible team. We want you to have the most unique and local experience that you can get on the island of Puerto Rico. We will visit two locations and explore different types of caves.

Will venture an hour into the north side of the island to one of the most unique local spots away from the city and the crowds. If you’re looking for adventure, this is the experience you are seeking for. You'll be able to river track up and down stream. Jump and swim in refreshing waters while being surrounded by stunning, lush vegetation. You'll be able to float through a beautiful and unique tunnel with impressive rock formations and learn about cave systems and the natural habitat around it, while exploring an underground cave. Afterwards will we enjoy an authentic Puerto Rican lunch. In our last location, we will learn about the history of the native people of Puerto Rico and explore one of the most important caves in the Caribbean.

title: Rainforest and Junglequi Zipline Combo Tour
description: This all-day tour allows you to escape the city and have and adventurous day at the Rainforest! Discover Puerto Rico’s Rainforest hiking through beautiful trails, watching breathtaking Natural pools and enjoying amazing views. You will stop along the way at Luquillo Beach and "kioskos" (Lunch at your own expense). Break from peace and quiet into an 9 Zip line adventure like no other; flying at more than 45 feet of altitude through one of the Natural Wonders of the World. This all-day tour includes round-trip transportation from the San Juan Marriott Stellaris Hotel.

title: Perfume Making a Guided Workshop
description:
Making your own perfume is a unique and personalized fragrance experience, setting it apart from traditional perfume shopping. 

Personalization: Customers can create a fragrance that is uniquely theirs, tailored to their personal tastes and preferences. This involves selecting from a variety of base notes, middle notes, and top notes to craft a custom blend. 

Interactive Experience: The process is hands-on, allowing customers to engage in the art of perfumery. This interactive aspect makes it a fun and educational experience. 

Creative Expression: It provides an opportunity for creative expression. Customers can experiment with different scent combinations and discover what appeals to them the most, making the experience both artistic and sensory. 

Unique Gifts: The personalized aspect to gift-giving adds a special touch that off-the-shelf perfumes lack. 

Memory Association: Creating a personalized scent can be linked to specific memories or events.

title: Half-Day Tour: El Yunque Rainforest and Waterslide Adventure
description:
This half-day tour to El Yunque, Puerto Rico, includes amazing adventure activities, pictures of your experience, fresh fruit, snacks and refreshments, natural water slides, an experienced tour guide and a day of unforgettable fun!

Experience the beauty of the only tropical rainforest in the USA with less than 30 other guests, which is almost half the number that many other El Yunque tours allow. Island Journeys, Puerto Rico, boasts professional and accredited local tour guides to ensure your adventures are nothing short of fantastic.

title: San Juan Ghost Tour: Shrieks in the Sugarcane
description:
Venture into the shadows of San Juan with Puerto Rico Ghosts, where vibrant history meets spine-chilling tales of the supernatural!

This immersive ghost tour uncovers the darker side of San Juan, revealing sinister secrets hidden beneath its picturesque charm. As you walk the cobblestone streets, you’ll join fellow seekers in unraveling the mysteries that haunt this enchanting city. Every site, from the eerie Plaza del Quinto Centenario to the storied Cuartel de Ballaja, is steeped in history and ghostly encounters.

This mile-long journey takes you through San Juan’s most haunted and historic locations, including the Museo de las Americas and Casa Blanca, where centuries of unexplained activity come to life. With each step, you’ll feel the weight of the past pressing in, making this tour an unforgettable plunge into Puerto Rico’s ghostly legacy.

Gather your courage and dive into the chilling world of San Juan’s haunted history!

images.caption: Ghosts and legends intertwine in a chilling narrative that unfolds on this guided tour.

title: Exclusive Floating Picnic: XL Paddleboard Oasis in Condado Lagoon
description: Enjoy a completely private and intimate experience on the water. This is a stationary floating picnic designed for couples who want to relax without the effort of paddling. Your private XL platform, equipped with a stable wooden deck and plush bean bags, will be securely anchored to a buoy in the middle of the Condado Lagoon. For one hour, you and your partner can enjoy the stunning views in total privacy, featuring a premium charcuterie board and a chilled bottle of Prosecco.

images.caption: A private and intimate moment for two on our anchored floating platform, featuring a romantic setup with rose petals and premium bean bags in Condado Lagoon

title: Private & Exclusive Historic Old and New San Juan Tours
description:
Experience the ultimate exploration of Old San Juan in a masterfully curated sightseeing and walking tour to the 90 most important landmarks of the city. A feat like this easily take at least 8 hours if done just walking, but we cover it all in eithier 2, 3, 4 hours or even a full day. By strolling in our premium vehicles providing., a sanctuary of cool comfort, you will avoid sweating under the sun or geting wet under the unexpected rain showers in the tropics. You'll appreciate Old San Juan with the ease of moving up and down the historic hills without exertion, ensuring your energy is reserved for enjoyment and discovery.

Your guide, an expert in the city's rich heritage, will lead you through Old San Juan's storied streets and facades, revealing the hidden tales behind each significant site. 

Choose from options that add Puerto Rico's finest rum distillery, Barrilito, our African Heritage Village, the Rainforest or all of the above for the ultimate full day San Juan Experience.

images.caption: Old San Juan City Hall

title: San Juan Watersports Car Rentals Red Bugatti
description: Experience the thrill of a VIP adventure with a water jet car. Drive a luxurious jet car that feels just like a sports car—on the water! Cruise through the crystal-clear Caribbean waters of San Juan Bay while taking in breathtaking views of iconic landmarks such as Old San Juan, La Fortaleza, and Castillo San Felipe del Morro. Whether you’re looking for an exciting ride for two or a fun-filled outing for the entire family, there’s a car that suits your needs. Feel the rush of speed as you explore the coast uniquely and exhilaratingly. This experience requires that drivers be 21 years of age or older, while passengers must be at least 12 years old, making it a perfect adventure for a wide variety of participants.

title: Private Charter - Icacos Island Snorkel and Boat Tour
description:
Enjoy the boat for yourselves! This is a private boat just for you and your friends and family. We will Include on board Waters, sodas, mixed rum drinks, Pina Coladas, snacks, deli sandwiches, Snorkeling gear, flotation devices and USCG certified Captain and crew..

Special Menus can be arranged and may be subject to additional charges depending the request.

title: Puerto Rico Island Wide Private Transfers, 11Pax Lux Sprinter Van
description:
Experience the Top Rated Ground Transportation Island-Wide. 

Your Bilingual Chauffeur will be waiting at the baggage claim area or cruise port terminal exit area. After retrieving your luggage, you will be escorted to one of our specially licensed vehicles parked right next to the cruise port or airport baggage claim exit; this ensures your arrival process seamless and fast.

-Top Rated Service by the TripAdvisor community.
-No waits at the Taxi or congested ride-share area. 
-Our Vehicles are fully air-conditioned, meticulously maintained, and insured for your safety and peace of mind. 
-The newest fleet on the island, with an average of use of 3 years or less. 
-All our drivers are vetted and have extensive experience navigating the island's roads and traffic.

title: Taino Hidden Caves Guided Tour
description: Embark on an unforgettable adventure in Arecibo! Discover the enchanting Indian Cave, delve into the rich history of the Taino and African-American cultures, and savor traditional culinary delights. Marvel at the stunning Arecibo Lighthouse and relax at Clearwater Beach while enjoying breathtaking Mason Views. Book now for an immersive experience that blends history, culture, and natural beauty!

title: SJU Airport To/From San Juan Hotels, Airbnb, Ports
description: Our premium taxi service guarantees a smooth ride in comfortable vehicles, with no hidden fees and professional drivers that prioritize your safety. Enjoy our free meet and greet airport service, which includes flight tracking and personalized welcome signs.

title: Discovering Puerto Rico: Lifestyle, Art, and Cultural Tour
description:
Get ready to be a local. If you enjoy Island vibes, visiting local spots or just like taking pictures in random places, then this tour is for you. 

Learn about our history. We usually start with a city tour of Old San Juan, where you'll see castles and forts built by Spain in the 1500s to fight pirates or enemies that wanted to invade. We stop by all the main sites.

Next we'll cruise down the beautiful coastlines and stop at some beaches, all beautiful in their own way. We will not stop at any of the beaches long enough to go swimming.

Next, feel our energy. Art is very important on this island. This is why we take you through a town covered with art, where local artists showcase their talent with beautiful murals.

Lastly, taste the traditional fritters in Loiza like Alcapurrias, Bacalaitos, Empanadillas, and more. You may even taste our local beer like medalla, magna, or ocean lab. Loiza is a town with a bit more of African Culture. I'm excited to meet you - see you soon!

images.caption: Loiza

title: Make Authentic Espadrilles in San Juan
description:
San Juan's #1 Espadrilles Experience!

Explore the history of the traditional Espadrilles, stitch your own pair and take it home as the most amazing souvenir. 

Reviewed as a once-in-a-lifetime experience by more than 10,000 guests. Awarded Tripadvisor Travellers' Choice in 2021 & 2023. A must-do in Barcelona according to BuzzFeed, The New York Times & many more.

We will meet at our workshop filled with materials, tools and products. This is where you become an insider on the history of this humble people's shoe that evolved into a major fashion trend. 

Together with master artisans you will craft your own pair of Espadrilles. Handpicking out of 100k+ different combinations, you will chose the size of the base, the stitching style and the color and type of the laces, you will learn the different ways to lace them up!

At the end, you will feel like a true artisan. You'll get a wearable memory of San Juan (hardly available to visitors) and a really cool story to tell. Are you ready?

title: Double ATV Adventure: Private Hacienda Experience with Transfer
description: Trade city vibes for countryside thrills and unleash your adventurous spirit with this ATV Experience. Enjoy the thrill of driving or riding in a 2 persons all-terrain vehicle through a 2,200-acre private ranch that leads you through plains, mountains, forests, lagoons, a plantation home and ends at the Mojito bar. We offer pick-up & drop-off only from major hotels in San Juan Metro area. The price listed is for a double ATV that seats two (a driver and a passenger.)

title: Taxi Service from Ceiba Ferry Terminal and Airport to San Juan
description:
If you're a tourist visiting Puerto Rico and looking for a reliable and convenient way to travel from Ceiba Ferry Terminal to San Juan Airport, Condado, or Old San Juan, Ceiba Taxi is the perfect solution for you!

As a tourist, you want to make the most of your time and experience all that Puerto Rico has to offer. Ceiba Ferry Terminal is a popular transportation hub, and Ceiba Taxi provides a fast and efficient way for you to reach your desired destination without any stress or hassle.

Our taxi service is known for its exceptional customer service and professionalism. Our drivers are knowledgeable about the local area and can offer you tips and recommendations to make the most of your stay in Puerto Rico. We are committed to providing you with a comfortable and stress-free journey! 

So, if you're a tourist looking for a reliable and convenient way to travel from Ceiba Ferry Terminal to San Juan Airport, Condado, or Old San Juan, Ceiba Taxi is the perfect choice for you.

images.caption: 15 Passenger Taxi to ceiba ferry

title: Salsa Dance Class in San Juan – Learn from Local Experts
description:
Salsa music and dance are a big aspect of the Puerto Rican lifestyle and culture. Learn the basics of it with or without a partner in a 1-hour beginner class! The park where the class is held is very centrally located with on walking-distance many bars and restaurants to have dinner and/or go out at night and practice what you have just learned!

Your instructor is a talented, fun and dynamic dancer. Take your chance and learn from the best, have fun and enjoy!

You will be guided through the first steps of Salsa dance at a beautiful outdoor location. After your class you will be ready in no time to hit the dance floor!

title: Rum, Cigars and Espadrilles in Old San Juan
description:
Embark on a unique adventure in Old San Juan, immersing yourself in the vibrant traditions of rum, cigars, and espadrilles. Discover hidden gems as you sip on exquisite rum, indulge in a cigar tasting, and join a lively party at an artisanal espadrille shop. This local and authentic experience offers three hours of cultural exploration, where you'll create unforgettable memories and bring home a pair of classic espadrilles. 

We recommend this experience as the ideal first step into the city’s vibrant culture. Along the way, we’ll share local tips and personal recommendations to help you savor every moment of your time on the island.

Get ready to embrace the true essence of San Juan in style.

Every stop on this experience is within walking distance. We also keep our groups small, never more than eight people, for a more personal and enjoyable experience.

title: Waterfalls, Caves and Native Petroglyphs Adventure from San Juan
description:
Skip the crowds at Charco El Hippie and discover what most visitors never find — hidden caves, ancient Taíno petroglyphs, and a secluded waterfall deep in the Puerto Rico jungle that few people ever reach.

This small-group guided day trip takes you to the off-the-beaten-path south side of El Yunque along the Rio Blanco in Naguabo. Hotel pickup from San Juan or Fajardo in an air-conditioned vehicle — no stressful mountain driving, no lost GPS signal, no car break-in risk at the trailhead.

Choose your adventure: swim in crystal-clear natural pools beneath the main waterfall, or gear up with helmets for the full expedition — river rapids, ancient petroglyphs and hidden waterfalls. Please note that parts of the hike may be physically demanding, and participation in certain sections is at the guide’s discretion.

Ends with a stop at the Naguabo Malecón — a Caribbean boardwalk with 30+ fresh seafood spots and ocean views. Small groups only. Limited spots per departure.

title: Rainforest Caves and Waterfalls Exploration with Transportation
